This '''unidentified stormtrooper''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. He fought at the [[Battle of Maridun (0 ABY)|Battle of Maridun]], where he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when he was stabbed in the back by an [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] spear. After seeing the man's death, [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] realized he would never know the fallen trooper's name.

{{Char-stub}}
